title: Revolving Door Profile
body: A weekend profile notices your new compliance sage used to regulate exactly the behaviors now described as misunderstandings.

title: Review Scope Leak
body: The supposedly independent review turns out to have terms narrow enough to qualify as decorative.

title: Hearing Transcript Pullquote
body: One exchange from the hearing escapes into headlines and suddenly your prepared calm sounds rehearsed for a reason.

title: Inspector General Letter
body: An internal oversight complaint suggests the inspection shuffle was less administrative than strategic.

title: Consent Order Breach Notice
body: The regulator returns with a short memo explaining that the remedial timeline was not, in fact, a suggestion.

title: Reform Office Whistleblower
body: A staffer from the internal reform unit explains that the project mostly measured optics and catered lunches.

title: Compliance Binder Mockery
body: Oversight staff compliment the binders, then ask whether any of the pages are intended to change reality.

title: Concession Monitor Report
body: The official monitor praises the visible slot concession and quietly notes it fixed almost nothing that mattered.

title: Camera Tail Whistleblower
body: A mechanic explains the grounded aircraft was chosen for optics, not risk, and the rest of the fleet does not appreciate the distinction.

title: Mayor Hot Mic
body: A local official praises your civic partnership on stage and mocks the layoffs off it, unfortunately into a live microphone.
